title: Neznámý titulek
content: Fight 2 Win 311 took place in Palo Alto, California on April 10th, 2026 and there was a ton of local talent featured throughout the event. The submission of the night came from veteran black belt Ahmed White, who spun to the opposite side for an armbar from the top and chased the finish even as his opponent attempted to defend. Lauren Sacks also got an impressive win over veteran black belt Karen Terra in the very next match too, locking up an ankle-lock for the finish. The headline matches all ended in decision though, with Dom Hoskins and Benji Silva getting the win in the co-main and main events respectively.
